sections.title: Active Proposals
sections.query: project = {prefix} AND type = Task AND status != Done

powers.label: Project Brief
powers.prompt: Generate a project brief for {key} "{summary}". Include scope, timeline, team, and budget estimate.

powers.label: Discovery Questions
powers.prompt: Generate discovery questions for {key} "{summary}". Focus on requirements, constraints, and success criteria.

powers.label: Feasibility
powers.prompt: Assess technical feasibility for {key} "{summary}". Include risks, dependencies, and effort estimate.

powers.label: Build Deck
powers.prompt: Create a presentation deck outline for {prefix} presales pipeline. Include value proposition, approach, and timeline.
